notes: Refactored the audio adapter to return staged MIR artifacts including beats, downbeats, bars, root candidates, frame chord candidates, and separation metadata.
Upgraded the Python MIR path to use Demucs stems by default, with HPSS fallback when separation fails.
Added bar-aware root-plus-harmony chord scoring and Viterbi-style smoothing before lead-sheet normalization.
open_issues: The full-length source track was not re-run to completion after the final optimization pass because Demucs on CPU is slow; verification used a 20-second clip from the same source.
Chord vocabulary is materially richer than before but still does not model slash-bass voicings or dense jazz extensions.
